name: Warm Narrator
description: Rich, warm male baritone. Great for audiobooks and storytelling.
reference_text: The old lighthouse keeper watched the storm roll in from the west. He'd seen a thousand storms, but this one felt different — heavier somehow, like the sky itself was holding its breath.

name: Bright Host
description: Energetic female voice with clear diction. Ideal for podcasts and explainers.
reference_text: Welcome back to the show! Today we're diving into something fascinating — the science behind why certain sounds make us feel safe. Buckle up, because this one gets weird.

name: Deep Anchor
description: Authoritative deep male voice. Perfect for documentaries and trailers.
reference_text: In the summer of nineteen sixty-nine, three men left the Earth behind. What they found on the surface of the moon would change humanity's understanding of its place in the universe.

name: Gentle Reader
description: Soft, calming female voice. Suited for meditation and children's content.
reference_text: Close your eyes and imagine a quiet meadow. The grass is soft beneath you, and somewhere nearby, a small stream is whispering over smooth stones. You're safe here. There's nowhere else you need to be.

name: Crisp Lecturer
description: Precise, measured delivery. Technical tutorials and presentations.
reference_text: Let's walk through this step by step. First, we initialize the configuration object. Then we pass it to the builder function, which validates each field before constructing the final output.

name: Velvet Evening
description: Smooth, intimate tone with a slight rasp. Late-night radio feel.
reference_text: It's just past midnight, and the city's finally quiet. There's something about this hour — the way the world slows down, the way every sound feels closer. Stay with me a while.

name: Young Storyteller
description: Casual, conversational twentysomething. Social media, vlogs, casual narration.
reference_text: Okay so here's the thing nobody tells you about moving to a new city — the first two weeks are amazing, week three hits you like a truck, and by month two you finally start finding your people.

name: Wise Elder
description: Weathered, deliberate voice with gravitas. Heritage, wisdom, reflective pieces.
reference_text: My grandfather used to say that patience isn't about waiting — it's about knowing that some things need time to become what they're meant to be. I didn't understand that until I was much older.

name: News Anchor
description: Polished, neutral broadcast delivery. News, corporate, professional.
reference_text: Good evening. Tonight's top story — researchers at the National Weather Service have confirmed what many suspected: this winter will be one for the record books. We go live to our correspondent.

name: Noir Detective
description: Gritty, world-weary voice. Crime fiction, drama, character work.
reference_text: She walked into my office like trouble wearing a red dress. I should've told her I was closed for the night. But the rain was coming down hard, and I never was good at saying no.

name: Cheerful Teacher
description: Warm, encouraging voice. Education, kids, e-learning.
reference_text: Great job! You got it right! Now let's try the next one together. Remember, there's no such thing as a wrong answer here — every guess gets us closer to figuring it out.

name: Epic Trailer
description: Dramatic, cinematic voice. Trailers, games, hype content.
reference_text: They said the old world was gone. They said nothing could survive beyond the wall. But one soldier refused to believe it — and what she discovered would ignite a war across every kingdom.

name: Soothing Guide
description: Gentle, grounding male voice. Meditation, wellness, breathing exercises.
reference_text: Take a slow breath in through your nose. Hold it gently. Now let it go. Feel your shoulders drop, your jaw soften. With each breath, you're letting go of everything that doesn't serve you.

name: Bold Commercial
description: Punchy, confident delivery. Ads, promos, product videos.
reference_text: Introducing the one thing your morning routine has been missing. It's faster, smoother, and designed for people who don't have time to wait. Available now — because your best day starts today.
